summary: A recorded Real America's Voice remote interview, posted by the USCIS Director, in a three-box split screen. A female host sits at left, the USCIS Director joins by video from center wearing glasses, a dark suit and a yellow tie with an American-flag lapel pin, and a male co-host joins at right; later the Director's feed fills the frame over a nighttime Washington skyline with the US Capitol dome. A chyron identifies him as 'DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW / Director, USCIS' and a 'Just the News' bug appears; a scrolling lower ticker carries unrelated headlines. The narration concerns citizenship requirements, English ability, and assimilation. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Three-box split: a female host at left, the USCIS Director by video in the center in a dark suit and yellow tie, a male co-host at right; chyron 'DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW / Director, USCIS'.

The Director's video fills the frame, seated against a night Washington skyline with the Capitol dome; chyron 'DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW' and a 'Just the News' bug; a headline ticker runs along the bottom.

notable_text: DIRECTOR JOSEPH EDLOW; Director, USCIS; Just the News; REAL AMERICA'S VOICE
